Global (All).title: Multiple Bomb Explosions in the Capital of Afghanistan Kill Multiple People: Reports
Global (All).summary: Multiple bomb explosions occurred in the capital of Kabul on June 26, 2023, killing multiple people and injuring many more. The Taliban has confirmed that the blasts were caused by improvised explosive devices (IEDs). The exact number of casualties is not yet known, but it is believed to be in the hundreds.

Global (All).title: Protests Erupt in Several Parts of Pakistan Over Economic Crisis and High Inflation: Reports
Global (All).summary: Protests have erupted in several parts of Pakistan over the country's deepening economic crisis and soaring inflation rates. The protesters are demanding that the government take immediate action to address the crisis and provide relief to the suffering citizens.

Global (All).title: Ukraine Conflict: Russian Drone Attack on Ukraine's Capital Leaves Several Dead: Reports
Global (All).summary: A Russian drone attack on Ukraine's capital, Kyiv, left several people dead and many more injured. The attack was reportedly carried out using advanced drone technology. The exact number of casualties is not yet known, but it is believed to be in the tens.

United States.title: Gun Violence: 3 people killed in a mass shooting in Highland Park, Illinois, near Chicago, on the day of a parade.
United States.summary: A gunman opened fire during the Highland Park 4th of July parade, killing 3 people and injuring 32 others.

United States.title: Supreme Court's Decision on Roe v. Wade: US sees Pro-Choice and Pro-Life protests across the country after the ruling.
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court overturned the landmark case of Roe v. Wade, allowing individual states to decide on abortion laws, leading to protests nationwide.

United States.title: US-Russia Tensions: US shoots down an Object over Alaska, believed to be a Russian spy balloon.
United States.summary: A US fighter jet intercepted and shot down an object that the US believed was a Russian spy balloon, escalating tensions between the two nations.

event1.description: North Korea claims it successfully tested a new ballistic missile that successfully fooled US intelligence, marking a significant escalation in the region's tensions

event2.description: South Korea's government called North Korea's launch of what it described as a 'fireworks' test a 'ballistic missile launch', heightening tensions on the peninsula

event3.description: North Korea has fired two 'unidentified projectiles', according to South Korea's military, further raising tensions on the Korean Peninsula

Japan.title: Japan's LDP to dissolve parliament, pave way for Abe's state funeral
Japan.summary: Japan's ruling Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) is set to dissolve parliament, paving the way for a state funeral for former Prime Minister Shinzo Abe.

Japan.title: Rising tensions between Japan and South Korea over military base plan
Japan.summary: Japan and South Korea are locked in a growing dispute over Japan's plan to relocate a US military base, with Seoul accusing Tokyo of breaching an agreement.
